_comment: Synthetic fixture — plan_documents table. Queried by claim-03-eligibility-check.md (Step 1) and claim-05-adjudication.md (Step 1). Each row stores a natural-language coverage matrix document (plan_document) for the given product_code + claim_type combination. The agent reads this document to interpret coverage scope, waiting periods, limits, and cost-sharing parameters. Monetary values are in SGD.
_replaces: db_plan_benefits.json — plan_benefits table has been superseded by plan_documents. Do not use plan_benefits for Nodes 3 or 5.

plan_documents.plan_document:
COMP-HEALTH-GOLD — Hospitalisation Coverage Matrix

Coverage Status: COVERED

Waiting Period: 30 calendar days from policy inception date. For claims where symptom onset predates the incident date, the waiting period is measured from the earliest documented symptom date.

Annual Benefit Limit: SGD 100,000 per benefit year (January to December). This limit is shared across all hospitalisation claims in the same year.

Per-Claim Limit: SGD 50,000 per single hospitalisation event.

Lifetime Limit: SGD 1,000,000 aggregate over the lifetime of the policy.

Annual Deductible: SGD 1,000 per benefit year. The deductible is applied first before any insurer payment. Any unused deductible from a prior year does not carry forward.

Co-Payment: 5% of the amount remaining after the deductible is applied. This is a fixed percentage payable by the claimant.

Co-Insurance: 10% of the amount remaining after co-payment, subject to a maximum co-insurance cap of SGD 3,000 per benefit year.

Non-Panel Provider Reimbursement: Where the treating hospital is not on the insurer's panel of accredited providers, reimbursement is capped at 80% of the adjudicated amount.

Exclusions: Cosmetic procedures (ICD-10 Z41.x), self-inflicted injuries (ICD-10 X71–X83), substance abuse unless explicitly endorsed (ICD-10 F10–F19), acts of war or terrorism (ICD-10 Y36.x, Y38.x), experimental or unregistered treatments.

Substance Abuse: Not covered under standard hospitalisation benefit.

Pre-Authorisation: Required for all planned hospitalisation events. Pre-authorisation number must be submitted with claim documents (format: PA-YYYY-NNNNNN). Claims without a valid pre-authorisation number will not be processed.

COMP-HEALTH-GOLD — Surgical Coverage Matrix

Coverage Status: COVERED

Waiting Period: 30 calendar days from policy inception date.

Annual Benefit Limit: SGD 80,000 per benefit year.

Per-Claim Limit: SGD 40,000 per surgical episode.

Lifetime Limit: SGD 1,000,000.

Annual Deductible: SGD 1,000 per benefit year (shared with hospitalisation deductible ledger).

Co-Payment: 5% of the post-deductible amount.

Co-Insurance: 10% of the post-co-payment amount, capped at SGD 3,000 per benefit year.

Non-Panel Provider Reimbursement: 80% of adjudicated amount for non-panel surgical facilities.

Exclusions: Cosmetic surgery, experimental procedures, surgeries arising from self-inflicted injury or substance abuse.

Pre-Authorisation: Required. A valid pre-authorisation certificate must accompany the claim.

COMP-HEALTH-GOLD — Outpatient Coverage Matrix

Coverage Status: COVERED

Waiting Period: 30 calendar days from policy inception date.

Annual Benefit Limit: SGD 10,000 per benefit year.

Per-Claim Limit: SGD 2,000 per outpatient consultation event.

Lifetime Limit: SGD 1,000,000.

Annual Deductible: SGD 1,000 per benefit year.

Co-Payment: 10% of the post-deductible amount.

Co-Insurance: 10% of the post-co-payment amount, capped at SGD 500 per benefit year.

Non-Panel Provider Reimbursement: 80% for non-panel outpatient clinics.

Exclusions: Non-medically necessary consultations, cosmetic treatments, substance abuse consultations (unless endorsed).

Pre-Authorisation: Not required for outpatient consultations.

COMP-HEALTH-GOLD — Maternity Coverage Matrix

Coverage Status: COVERED

Waiting Period: 270 calendar days (9 months) from policy inception date. This is measured from the earliest documented symptom or conception date if earlier than the incident date.

Annual Benefit Limit: SGD 20,000 per benefit year.

Per-Claim Limit: SGD 10,000 per maternity event.

Lifetime Limit: SGD 1,000,000.

Annual Deductible: SGD 1,000 per benefit year.

Co-Payment: 0% — no co-payment applies to maternity claims under the Gold plan.

Co-Insurance: 10% of the post-co-payment amount, capped at SGD 2,000 per benefit year.

Non-Panel Provider Reimbursement: 80% for non-panel maternity providers.

Exclusions: Elective terminations, cosmetic post-natal procedures.

Pre-Authorisation: Required. Pre-authorisation certificate must be obtained at least 30 days before the expected delivery date.

COMP-HEALTH-GOLD — Emergency Coverage Matrix

Coverage Status: COVERED

Waiting Period: 0 days — emergency coverage is immediate from policy inception.

Annual Benefit Limit: SGD 15,000 per benefit year.

Per-Claim Limit: SGD 5,000 per emergency episode.

Lifetime Limit: SGD 1,000,000.

Annual Deductible: SGD 1,000 per benefit year.

Co-Payment: 0% — no co-payment applies to emergency claims.

Co-Insurance: 0% — no co-insurance applies to emergency claims.

Non-Panel Provider Reimbursement: 80% for non-panel emergency facilities.

Exclusions: Events that were not genuine medical emergencies (elective visits presented as emergencies).

Pre-Authorisation: Not required for emergency claims. However, retrospective notification must be submitted within 24 hours of admission.

COMP-HEALTH-GOLD — Dental Coverage Matrix

Coverage Status: COVERED

Waiting Period: 0 days.

Annual Benefit Limit: SGD 2,000 per benefit year.

Per-Claim Limit: SGD 500 per dental visit.

Lifetime Limit: SGD 1,000,000.

Annual Deductible: SGD 0 — no deductible applies to dental claims.

Co-Payment: 20% of the billed amount per visit.

Co-Insurance: 0%.

Non-Panel Provider Reimbursement: 80%.

Exclusions: Cosmetic dental procedures (veneers, whitening), orthodontic treatments not medically indicated.

Pre-Authorisation: Not required.

COMP-HEALTH-GOLD — Vision Coverage Matrix

Coverage Status: COVERED

Waiting Period: 0 days.

Annual Benefit Limit: SGD 1,000 per benefit year.

Per-Claim Limit: SGD 300 per vision claim.

Lifetime Limit: SGD 1,000,000.

Annual Deductible: SGD 0.

Co-Payment: 20% of the billed amount.

Co-Insurance: 0%.

Non-Panel Provider Reimbursement: 80%.

Exclusions: Cosmetic vision corrections (laser eye surgery for refractive purposes only), designer eyewear.

Pre-Authorisation: Not required.

COMP-HEALTH-GOLD — Mental Health Coverage Matrix

Coverage Status: COVERED

Waiting Period: 0 days.

Annual Benefit Limit: SGD 5,000 per benefit year.

Per-Claim Limit: SGD 1,000 per consultation episode.

Lifetime Limit: SGD 1,000,000.

Annual Deductible: SGD 1,000 per benefit year.

Co-Payment: 10% of the post-deductible amount.

Co-Insurance: 10% of the post-co-payment amount, capped at SGD 500 per benefit year.

Non-Panel Provider Reimbursement: 80%.

Substance Abuse: Not covered under mental health benefit. Substance abuse disorders (ICD-10 F10–F19) are excluded.

Exclusions: Substance abuse disorders, court-ordered psychiatric evaluations, non-therapeutic counselling.

Pre-Authorisation: Not required.

COMP-HEALTH-SILVER — Hospitalisation Coverage Matrix

Coverage Status: COVERED

Waiting Period: 60 calendar days from policy inception date.

Annual Benefit Limit: SGD 60,000 per benefit year.

Per-Claim Limit: SGD 30,000 per hospitalisation event.

Lifetime Limit: SGD 600,000.

Annual Deductible: SGD 2,000 per benefit year.

Co-Payment: 10% of the post-deductible amount.

Co-Insurance: 15% of the post-co-payment amount, capped at SGD 3,000 per benefit year.

Non-Panel Provider Reimbursement: 70% for non-panel hospitals.

Exclusions: Same standard exclusions apply (cosmetic, self-inflicted, substance abuse, war/terrorism).

Substance Abuse: Not covered.

Pre-Authorisation: Required for all planned hospitalisations.

Coverage Status: COVERED

Waiting Period: 60 calendar days.

Annual Benefit Limit: SGD 50,000.

Per-Claim Limit: SGD 25,000.

Lifetime Limit: SGD 600,000.

Annual Deductible: SGD 2,000.

Co-Payment: 10%.

Co-Insurance: 15%, capped at SGD 3,000.

Non-Panel Provider Reimbursement: 70%.

Pre-Authorisation: Required.

Annual Benefit Limit: SGD 5,000.

Per-Claim Limit: SGD 500 per outpatient visit.

Lifetime Limit: SGD 600,000.

Annual Deductible: SGD 2,000.

Co-Payment: 20%.

Co-Insurance: 15%, capped at SGD 300.

Non-Panel Provider Reimbursement: 70%.

Pre-Authorisation: Not required.

COMP-HEALTH-SILVER — Maternity Coverage Matrix

Coverage Status: COVERED

Waiting Period: 365 calendar days (12 months) from policy inception date.

Annual Benefit Limit: SGD 10,000.

Per-Claim Limit: SGD 5,000.

Lifetime Limit: SGD 600,000.

Annual Deductible: SGD 2,000.

Co-Payment: 0%.

Co-Insurance: 15%, capped at SGD 1,500.

Non-Panel Provider Reimbursement: 70%.

Pre-Authorisation: Required.

Coverage Status: COVERED

Annual Benefit Limit: SGD 10,000.

Per-Claim Limit: SGD 3,000.

Annual Deductible: SGD 2,000.

Co-Payment: 0%.

COMP-HEALTH-SILVER — Dental Coverage Matrix

Coverage Status: COVERED

Waiting Period: 0 days.

Annual Benefit Limit: SGD 1,000.

Per-Claim Limit: SGD 300.

Lifetime Limit: SGD 600,000.

Annual Deductible: SGD 0.

Co-Payment: 30%.

Co-Insurance: 0%.

Non-Panel Provider Reimbursement: 70%.

Pre-Authorisation: Not required.

COMP-HEALTH-SILVER — Vision Coverage Matrix

Coverage Status: NOT COVERED

Vision benefits are not included under the COMP-HEALTH-SILVER plan. Claims submitted under this claim type will be rejected with BENEFIT_NOT_IN_PLAN.

COMP-HEALTH-SILVER — Mental Health Coverage Matrix

Coverage Status: COVERED

Waiting Period: 0 days.

Annual Benefit Limit: SGD 3,000.

Per-Claim Limit: SGD 600.

Lifetime Limit: SGD 600,000.

Annual Deductible: SGD 2,000.

Co-Payment: 20%.

Co-Insurance: 15%, capped at SGD 300.

Non-Panel Provider Reimbursement: 70%.

Substance Abuse: Not covered.

Pre-Authorisation: Not required.

COMP-HEALTH-BRONZE — Hospitalisation Coverage Matrix

Coverage Status: COVERED

Waiting Period: 90 calendar days from policy inception date.

Annual Benefit Limit: SGD 30,000 per benefit year.

Per-Claim Limit: SGD 15,000 per hospitalisation event.

Lifetime Limit: SGD 300,000.

Annual Deductible: SGD 3,500 per benefit year.

Co-Payment: 20% of the post-deductible amount.

Co-Insurance: 20% of the post-co-payment amount, capped at SGD 2,000 per benefit year.

Non-Panel Provider Reimbursement: 60% for non-panel hospitals.

Exclusions: Standard exclusions apply.

Substance Abuse: Not covered.

Pre-Authorisation: Required for all planned hospitalisations.
